$description: Menu component tokens — the dropdown action menu (menu-button pattern). A floating overlay surface (background.alt + shadow.overlay) holding a column of action items; items express state through quiet tint fills, and destructive items through the danger foreground.

menu.$description: Dropdown action menu opened from a trigger control. The surface sits one elevation step above the page (overlay shadow, elevated border); items are flat until hovered/focused, where a quiet green-tinted fill signals interactivity without shouting.

background.$description: Menu surface — elevated neutral, same tier as cards/popovers. Depth comes from shadow.overlay.

border.$description: Structural chrome edge — separates the floating surface from whatever it overlaps.

radius.$description: Menu corner radius — 8px, the dropdown surface language.

foreground.$description: Item label text — primary foreground on the menu surface (11.2:1 AAA).

background.$description: Hovered/focused item fill — quiet green tint. Interactivity signal, rule-compliant: the item is interactive.

foreground.$description: Destructive item label — danger foreground (5.7:1 AA on the menu surface).

background.$description: Hovered/focused destructive item fill — dark red tint mirrors the green hover recipe.

foreground.$description: Disabled item label — deeply receded, blends into the surface.

separator.$description: Divider between item groups — lowest decorative rung, a separator within a surface.
